_publications._publicationTitle: Performance Evaluation of SpliceAI for the Prediction of Splicing of

_contextSnippet: The AUC of MES/SSF was 0.841 (p < 0.0001, area = 0.5); however, SpliceAI showed a significantly larger AUC (difference 0.134, p < 0.0001).
details: Significantly larger AUC compared to MES/SSF (difference 0.134, p < 0.0001)
